text.message: Why did you even pick that spot
You’re doing this to yourself blue
Soloing last place for a spot I pointed too
u realize that’s literally my only spot I can go
don’t know why u had to speak like that
You started off by placing in a spot to clog the board
Then started racing for every spot you could
Don’t know how someone can be this greedy lmao
did u want me to not get any roads?
I don’t know about the greedy part, but black is correct that your approach puts you in conflict with everyone
literally what am I supposed to do
it’s a game of conflicted guys u have to beat other to win
so oj cutting me off at the beginning doesn’t put him in conflict with me?
yea but I know it’s part of the game and I get over it
Once that happened you were in tough spot
It wasn’t even a good spot it was horrible compared to your other spots
Well blue you blocked my settle by doing so and you know what you were doing
if I go 4 3 11 i’m blocking reds settle
there’s no way to win here
That first placement already told us what kind of person you were
I saw that it was unlikely to be there
